memories.content: Waves 1-10 CRUD (2026-01-14). Market Data Pipeline 253K (2026-02-05). ReportSettings + Zod (2026-02-07). Sales Analysis (2026-02-10). Construction Pipeline (2026-02-11). UW Model Grouping Phase 3-4 (2026-03-03). Activity logging, Docker, Tech Debt (2026-02-12). Extraction Hardening (2026-03-03). Login Flow + Auth Guards (2026-03-03). Local OneDrive Extraction (2026-03-03). Deals Overhaul: kanban, aerial maps, activity feed, SharePoint (2026-03-04). Deals v5: Returns, Compare Deals, shadcn CSS (2026-03-04). Group Pipeline Frontend, Vite optimization (2026-03-05). Cap Rate TC T3 re-run + 49 regression tests (2026-03-05). UW Grouping Expansion: 9 groups, 66 files, 2,970 values (2026-03-06). Proforma Returns UI Option C (2026-03-06). Phase 2-3 Dashboard Integrity (2026-03-06, commit 70dc0ca): 30 files, 6 parallel agents — city Unknown fix, NOI per-unit/total fix, expense fallback, operationsByYear builder from YEAR_N fields, shortPropertyName across 12 components, ?? 0 → ?? undefined for N/A display, comparison chart null fixes. Tests: 1700 backend + 877 frontend.

conda env: dashboard-backend. Dev: npm run dev:all (auto-opens Edge). Git: stash apply over pop, don't push unless asked. NO mock/fake data. User: matt@bandrcapital.com / Wildcats777!! / admin. User expects Agent Team approach from docs/agent-team-reference.md (Teams 48-56). Don't tunnel-vision on grep results — execute full agent team plan with 6 parallel agents. Review each page in depth. Data observations (items 8-12) are NOT issues. Cordoba != Cordova. Option C for old UW model attributes. Auth login uses form data (not JSON): data={'username':..., 'password':...}.

Zod: .nullable().optional() + ?? undefined (NOT ?? 0). Legitimate ?? 0: loss factor rates, sum reducers, stage value totals. TWO API CLIENTS: src/lib/api.ts (axios) + src/lib/api/client.ts (fetch). shadcn needs CSS vars in :root + tailwind mappings. KPICard: treatZeroAsNA prop (default true) for financial vs count metrics. ESLint: error-level unused imports in CI. Property detail: lazy enrichment via CRUDProperty.enrich_financial_data() — queries extracted_values, builds financial_data JSON, persists to DB column as cache. Zod property schema expects full nested structure (operations, performance, valuation) — backend must return 0s not null objects. SQLite tests: no server_default, datetime.now(UTC), StaticPool. _dec() converts float->Decimal for SQLAlchemy Numeric columns. Units fallback: derive from purchasePrice/pricePerUnit. _property_transforms.py: _is_placeholder_city() catches Unknown/submarkets-as-cities; city_fallback also filtered through placeholder check; expense keys have dual legacy/full variants; NOI: prop.noi is per-unit (×units), ops.noiYear1 is total (use directly), negative noiYear1 = extraction artifact (skip). totalOperatingExpenses from group pipeline is per-unit. operationsByYear built from YEAR_N extracted values via _build_ops_from_extracted_values() in crud_property.py.

LOCAL_DEALS_ROOT=/mnt/c/Users/MattBorgeson/OneDrive - B&R Capital/B&R Capital - Real Estate/Deals. Quick Extraction and Group Pipeline are INDEPENDENT systems writing to same extracted_values table. All 9 deferred groups extracted (66 files, 2,970 values). 2 excluded groups are Asset Management (correctly excluded). DB: 597,713 extracted values, 329 properties, 75 runs. PLANNED: Single 'Run Full Pipeline' button. DB table: properties (PostgreSQL). 48 properties have city='Unknown' — resolved at transform layer via _is_placeholder_city fallback to Phoenix. Property names contain '(Unknown, AZ)' — frontend strips parenthetical via shortPropertyName().

All 6 Phase 2-3 agents COMPLETED and committed (70dc0ca). NEXT: Phase 4 Final Gate (Team 56). HIGH: Group Pipeline safeguards — single 'Run Full Pipeline' button. MEDIUM: Extract 28 ungrouped files, Data Export. LOW: Production hosting, Mobile/iOS, Security audit.

It still shows an agent running and the task "Audit & Fix Mapping Page" associated with the agent. Are you certain I'm fine to kill and restart the servers?
Confirmed — MappingPage changes are committed. That agent is a stale leftover. Safe to kill it.
Only a blank page open. The servers need to be restarted. Want me to run `npm run dev:all` to start them up?
Also, please provide a command that I can use to ensure both servers are dead and then I a command reset them/

Both ports are already free. Here are the commands:

**Kill both servers:**
```bash
kill $(lsof -ti :5173,:8000) 2>/dev/null; echo "Killed"
```

**Restart:**
```bash
npm run dev:all
```

The comma syntax doesn't work on this `lsof` version. Use this instead:

**Kill both servers:**
```bash
kill $(lsof -ti :5173) $(lsof -ti :8000) 2>/dev/null; echo "Killed"
```

**Restart:**
```bash
np
how do I kill the agent still showing as runing?

You can kill it from within Claude Code by pressing `Escape` to cancel any running operations, or use the `/agents` dialog to find and stop it.

If that doesn't work, you can kill the underlying Claud
